creator: hohmuth@inf.tu-dresden.de
text:
/usr/local/share/nethack/nethack is installed with setgid "games", but
the GTK library it uses doesn't seem to like that.  It prints:

% nethack

Gtk-WARNING **: This process is currently running setuid or setgid.
This is not a supported use of GTK+. You must create a helper
program instead. For further details, see:

    http://www.gtk.org/setuid.html

Refusing to initialize GTK+.
Exit 1
%

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: 
As root:
  pkg_add -r nethack-gtk

As user:
  /usr/local/bin/nethack
